creator: kristinacors
caption: What are YOUR favorite Hotels in Bodrum, Turkey? #travelbucketlist #luxuryhotels #besthotels #bodrum #mgallery

transcription.text: Luxury hotels for people who don't do ordinary. If you haven't been to Bodrum in Turkey, you're missing out. This hotel doesn't just welcome you, they treat you like royalty. As if greeting you with warm towels and a drink weren't enough, they also gift you a stone bracelet of your choosing, charged with the energy you need more of in your life. Yes, really. The room was perfection. Minimal, sophisticated interiors that whispered elegance without trying too hard. But the real star of the show was this balcony. The view alone could make you cancel your plans. Actually, it's hard to decide between the balcony and the infinity pool. We lounged there for hours. We also loved the location of this hotel. It was close to our dinner and late night spot at Zuma. Actually, let me know if you want me to do another video about where you went for dinner. Oh, and did I mention that this hotel sits right on the sea? Beach access included, because of course. The name of this hotel is M Gallery. So have you gotten to Bodrum, Turkey yet? Let me know if you're planning a trip in the comments and follow for more luxury escapes that take your breath away. you
